### Odoo 19.2: What actually changed (real improvements, no fluff)
Some renamed buttons. Nothing that really changes how you work. But Odoo 19.2 is a bit different. This one isn’t about hype. It’s about fixing real business friction.
Source: https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/odoo-192-what-actually-changed-real-improvements-fluff-cmhjf

### What’s New in Odoo 19.2? Features That Make ERP Even Smarter
Explore the latest improvements in Odoo 19.2 and how they enhance ERP usability, automation, collaboration, and operational efficiency.
Source: https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/odoo-192-small-updates-big-impact-everyday-business-nirav-parmar-vzcac

### A Complete Guide to the Aged Receivables Report in Odoo 19...
In Odoo 19 Accounting, an Aged Receivables report is a financial report that displays all outstanding client invoices arranged according to the length of time they have been past due.
Source: https://www.cybrosys.com/blog/a-complete-guide-to-the-aged-receivables-report-in-odoo-19-accounting-reports

### GitHub - odoo/odoo: Odoo. Open Source Apps To Grow Your Business.
odoo/odoo. 19.0.Odoo Apps can be used as stand-alone applications, but they also integrate seamlessly so you get a full-featured Open Source ERP when you install several Apps.
Source: https://github.com/odoo/odoo

### Managing Leave Allocation and Accrual Plans in Odoo 19... | Medium
Odoo 19 simplifies this entire process through its enhanced Time off module, which now offers a cleaner workflow for leave allocation, accrual planning and real-time tracking.Odoo 19 makes this easy by allowing HR managers to assign leave in three ways: Direct Manual Allocation.
Source: https://medium.com/@veuzsaseo/managing-leave-allocation-and-accrual-plans-in-odoo-19-time-off-ee6998f315c0

### Breaking Changes | Electron
Breaking changes will be documented here, and deprecation warnings added to JS code where possible, at least one major version before the change is made.Planned Breaking API Changes (19.0). Removed: IA32 Linux binaries.
Source: https://www.electronjs.org/docs/latest/breaking-changes

### Windows install | Flutter
Breaking changes. Release notes.Note: As of Flutter’s 1.19.0 dev release, the Flutter SDK contains the dart command alongside the flutter command so that you can more easily run Dart command-line programs.
Source: https://hrk-flutter-website.web.app/docs/get-started/install/windows

### Conventional Commits без лишних слов: ваша шпаргалка / Хабр
BREAKING CHANGE: deprecated endpoints removed. Откат изменений: revert: revert commit c12345. Reverts changes that broke login functionality. Надеюсь, эта шпаргалка станет удобным подспорьем в написании чётких и полезных сообщений для коммитов.
Source: https://habr.com/ru/articles/867012/
